# James and Adelle meet

Part: Part 1 (../TWOLD%20Plot/TWOLD%20scenes%20by%20part/Parts%20database/Part%201%2045e34e3cf3814d31b30c871d3a488155.md)
📁 Characters: James (../Data/Characters/James%2014f6a0f77a694f4cb18881bb58846c94.md), Adelle (../Data/Characters/Adelle%202ff1980fd10b42a7bc0f65b61a2ab3e8.md)
📁 Location: The Nameless City (../Data/Locations/The%20Nameless%20City%202639e47762d1483c9c8619c59575b713.md)
Order: 5000
Status: Yes
Arcs: James and Adelle reunited (../TWOLD%20Plot/Arcs/James%20and%20Adelle%20reunited%20235f77e3ed9f451cbc2aeed09437bd3d.md)
Product: TWOLD (../Data/Products/TWOLD%20e028aa0786f5449984a4f497c1d746fa.md)

“Adelle!”

Adelle turned around.

“James!”

“I’m so sorry I’m late!”

“Are you married?”

“No!  I am quite single.”

“This is just like a dream!”

“Yes, but who’s dream is it?”

Adelle’s eyes glistened.

“It’s both of ours.”
